summary: WCAG contrast for fm-status-num red on --card-bg in dark mode was RESOLVED by EXP-271 — font-size bumped to 1.2rem to clear AA large-text threshold (18.7px bold), and sub-status uses --ink-2 for dark-mode contrast. Existing test at test.js asserts both. EXP-277 includes this in its closure-tracking holes_addressed list. Recommend close as 'resolved by EXP-271; tracked under EXP-277 audit trail.'
